description: UpperMesh upper for maximum breathability.Reflectives for greater safety dawn to dusk.Padded collar and tongue for snug Fit and shock absorption.Lace up front for snug fit.MidsoleIdCELL midsole with ArchTec component for greater support.OrthoLite insole for superior breathability, moisture control, anti-microbial properties.Cushioned footbed made from an environmentally friendly, sustainable material instead of traditional fossil fuel-based material.OutsoleEverTrack outsole for abrasion resistance with EverRide component for lightweight cushioningMulti directional patterns in carbon rubber for strong grip on uneven terrainScoop below the heel area for ultimate air traction while running or walking
